paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.05, with a 2.02% change versus the prior close and a -36.32% change over a window of 20 sessions. The price is as of July 17, 2026.

There are 2 new news headlines in the last 24 hours, both from July 17, 2026, discussing the resignation of director designee Miles Everson due to governance concerns and the completion of a $375 million offering of 5.00% senior convertible notes. The news headlines are from simplywall.st and Yahoo Finance.

There is 1 Form 4 filing and 0 Form 144 filings, with a total of 25 filings in the feed. Recent filings include an 8-K form from July 15, 2026, regarding the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and another 8-K form from July 13, 2026, disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson.
